heroLead: We started Axon Funded because we were frustrated with prop firms that made it almost impossible to succeed. Hidden rules, slow payouts, unfair practices. We built what we wished existed.
statsPlaceholder: Verified company metrics will be published here when available.
missionP1: Every day, thousands of talented traders sit on the sidelines — not because they lack skill, but because they lack capital. We believe that shouldn't be a barrier.
missionP2: We focus on a transparent two-phase evaluation and documented payout mechanics in the Trading Rules. We do not publish headline trader or payout totals on this marketing page.
missionP3: Our two-phase evaluation process is designed to find traders who demonstrate consistent, disciplined risk management — not just lucky streaks. If you have the skills, we provide the framework described in your agreement.
valuesSubtitle: The values that guide every decision we make

values.title: Full Transparency
values.desc: We publish our rules clearly, without hidden clauses. Every rule is written in plain language — no surprises, no fine print.

values.title: Trader-First
values.desc: Every decision we make starts with: 'How does this help traders succeed?' We build the tools we wish existed when we evaluated firms.

values.title: Global Accessibility
values.desc: Trading talent exists everywhere. Where permitted, we welcome international participants and document payout rails in your dashboard.

values.title: Real Relationships
values.desc: Support should be reachable and documented. We invest in help channels and clear SLAs instead of anonymous walls.

values.title: Merit-Based
values.desc: We don't care about your age, background, or credentials. If you can trade consistently and manage risk under the published rules, that is what counts.

values.title: Speed & Reliability
values.desc: We aim for fast account delivery and predictable processing windows — subject to compliance checks and market holidays.

teamPlaceholder: We do not list placeholder bios. When leadership profiles are published, they will appear in this section.
ctaLead: Read the Trading Rules and checkout terms, then begin the evaluation when you are ready.
